title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected
scenario: Home screen shows "Let's Get Started!" with Select Device and Phone Settings buttons when app is launched with no devices connected
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected or paired to the phone.
Observe the Home screen that appears.
expected: The Home screen displays: a title "Let's Get Started!", instructional text about selecting a device or using Bluetooth settings, and two buttons labeled "Select Device" and "Phone Settings".
